Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the visual quality of drawings and shapes by improving how strokes are rendered.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUseMultipleStrokes_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the use of multiple drawing strokes in the game engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Enables more detailed and complex artwork in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUseScaledStrokes_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Applies a scaling factor to drawing strokes for better visual consistency.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides players with clearer and more visually appealing graphics in games.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string for version control in the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and versions of the game more effectively.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how timestamps are displayed in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides a clearer and more accurate display of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a specific method for handling strings related to version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the efficiency of string processing, which can lead to faster updates and better performance.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling by using a faster method for timestamp processing.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance in games that rely on timestamps, making them run smoother.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagSelfViewFixMakeup_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Fixes issues with how makeup appears in the self-view of avatars.
Removed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see their avatars' makeup correctly, enhancing customization.
